channel.title: Locations on The City
channel.description: Recent content in Locations on The City

item.title: Dew Drop Inn
item.description: The Dew Drop Inn is a redneck looking place. Not very friendly to anybody but regulars or people vouched for by regulars. Like many places in The City, it’s a living stereotype. The worst stereotypes of deep south white trash hang out here. A reliable fixer works out of one the back booths.

item.title: The Drains
item.description:
“People say the sewers only carry rain and waste. But sometimes, late at night, something down there reminds you the stories about the alligators were never meant to be jokes.”

For most people, what goes down the drains never comes back. In the City, what goes down the drain can come back to haunt you or crawl out to hunt you. Gators may be the least of your worries.

The drains in the City were inspired by many sources. Stories, the Paris Catacombs, urban legends about New York, and a wastewater management class in college. IT also played a large part.
